title: feat(playground): standalone playground app
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds `apps/playground` — a standalone React 19 + Vite + Tailwind v4 SPA for image, video, text, and audio generation.
- Uses the shared SDK/UI packages: catalog loading, BYOP auth state, model selector, themed controls, and media output rendering.
- Improves multimodal inputs: registry-driven reference image caps, video first/last frame controls, audio upload for STT models, and filled-state file previews.
- Keeps transcript/text output readable in a scrollable document-style output panel.
- Registers the app in `apps/apps.json` for `app-deploy-automatic.yml`.
- Notes: the `pk_` app key in `config.ts` is public BYOP app config; no local token/debug override is shipped.

Checks:
- `npx biome check --write apps/playground/src/Playground.tsx apps/playground/src/style.css packages/ui/src/compositions/FileUpload.tsx packages/ui/src/primitives/icons/index.tsx shared/registry/registry.ts`
- `npm run build --prefix apps/playground`
- `npm run test --prefix packages/ui`
- `git diff --check`

gist.headline: A playground for the hive
gist.blurb: We just dropped a brand new standalone playground app for all your generation needs. Whether you're spinning up images, video, text, or audio, the sandbox is officially open.
gist.summary: Added a standalone React 19 playground app featuring multimodal inputs, video frame controls, and audio uploads for testing all generation models in one place.
gist.impact: Users can now experiment with image, video, text, and audio generation through a dedicated, feature-rich UI with advanced file preview and reference controls.
gist.visual_concept: A literal digital playground or sandbox. Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot playing together. Polly building something out of code/blocks, representing the multimodal generation capabilities.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny propeller beanie, building a sandcastle out of glowing code blocks in a digital sandbox. A chunky Monitor Robot sits nearby holding a picture frame showing a generated landscape. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.
